mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chewei_yuyue WHERE addtime >= #{start} AND addtime <= #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chezijinchang WHERE jinchangshijian >= #{start} AND jinchangshijian <= #{end}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(bencitingchefeiyong), 0) FROM tingchejiaofei WHERE ispay = '已支付' AND lichangshijian IS NOT NULL AND lichangshijian >= #{start} AND lichangshijian <= #{end}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(jine), 0) FROM tingche_bujiao WHERE zhuangtai = '已支付' AND addtime >= #{start} AND addtime <= #{end}
